scripts.build: next build && echo '[POSTBUILD] Copying static assets...' && cp -r public .next/standalone/public && cp -r .next/static .next/standalone/.next/static && echo '[POSTBUILD] Installing crash-proof server wrapper...' && mv .next/standalone/server.js .next/standalone/server_nextjs.js && cp hostinger-server.js .next/standalone/server.js && echo '[POSTBUILD] Installing custom htaccess...' && cp .htaccess .next/standalone/.htaccess && echo '[POSTBUILD] Done!'
